home.title: BUILD ANYTHING YOU CAN IMAGINE
home.placeholderRemix: Edit the prompt or just hit submit to start...

chat.emptyDescription: Ask questions, brainstorm ideas, or just have a conversation.

suggestions.0: What can you help me with?

axes.game: Choose the kind of play loop you want.
axes.website: Choose the kind of site you want to make.
axes.tool: Choose the kind of job the tool should do.
axes.tracker: Choose what the app should keep tabs on.
axes.creative: Choose the kind of creative output you want.
axes.personal: Choose the slice of life you want the app to help with.

game.label: Game
game.description: Something playful, interactive, and easy to pick up.

website.label: Website
website.description: A landing page or themed site with a clear public-facing purpose.

tool.label: Tool
tool.description: A focused utility that helps someone do one job quickly.

tracker.label: Tracker
tracker.description: An app that logs progress, counts, habits, or collections.

creative.label: Creative
creative.description: Something expressive, visual, or playful for making things.

personal.label: Personal
personal.description: An app for everyday life, moods, choices, or routines.

arcade.label: Arcade
arcade.description: Fast loops, scores, reflexes, and instant replay value.

puzzle.label: Puzzle
puzzle.description: Pattern solving, logic, and satisfying little wins.

quiz.label: Quiz
quiz.description: Trivia, guessing, and playful challenge rounds.

cozy.label: Cozy
cozy.description: Low-pressure, charming interactions and soft vibes.

portfolio.label: Portfolio
portfolio.description: Showcase a person, project, or body of work.

smallBusiness.label: Small business
smallBusiness.description: Promote a service, menu, studio, or local brand.

event.label: Event
event.description: Highlight a launch, gathering, schedule, or RSVP flow.

fanPage.label: Fan page
fanPage.description: Celebrate a niche obsession, artist, team, or fictional world.

generator.label: Generator
generator.description: Create names, combinations, prompts, or random outputs.

calculator.label: Calculator
calculator.description: Compute totals, scores, costs, or conversions.

planner.label: Planner
planner.description: Help someone organize choices, steps, or schedules.

comparer.label: Comparer
comparer.description: Let someone weigh options side by side.

habits.label: Habits
habits.description: Track routines, streaks, consistency, or daily check-ins.

money.label: Money
money.description: Track spending, saving, splitting, or budgeting.

fitness.label: Fitness
fitness.description: Track movement, workouts, goals, or recovery.

collection.label: Collection
collection.description: Track books, foods, cards, outfits, or anything collectible.

visual.label: Visual
visual.description: Colors, layouts, collages, pixel art, or image play.

writing.label: Writing
writing.description: Words, captions, prompts, stories, or poetic experiments.

music.label: Music
music.description: Mood, playlists, rhythm, or sound-based ideas.

meme.label: Meme energy
meme.description: Chaotic, funny, internet-native, and very shareable.

food.label: Food
food.description: Help decide, rank, plan, or randomize meals and cravings.

travel.label: Travel
travel.description: Trips, destination picks, road plans, or local adventures.

relationships.label: Relationships
relationships.description: Dates, friendship games, compatibility, or conversation starters.

selfCare.label: Self-care
selfCare.description: Mood, reflection, routines, encouragement, or calm.

errors.genericIdeas: The idea generator returned something unusable. Try again.
errors.genericPrompt: The prompt writer failed. Pick the idea again or retry.

apps.title: My Apps
apps.emptyDescription: Start building your first app by describing what you want to create.
apps.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.

inspo.title: GET INSPIRED
inspo.emptyDescription: We're adding {category} examples soon. Try another category or start building!
inspo.comingSoonDescription: We're curating inspiring examples. Check back soon!

explore.title: EXPLORE
explore.subtitle: Discover apps built by the community
explore.signInToRemix: Sign in to make it your own
explore.emptyDescription: Be the first to publish an app! Open any app and use the Share button to publish it to the community.
explore.errorDescription: Failed to load the feed. Please try again later.

profile.title: PROFILE
profile.emptyDescription: This user hasn't published any apps to the community yet.

auth.signInDescription: Continue with your account to start building
auth.terms: By signing in, you agree to our terms of service

guest.banner: Sign in to save your work & get more daily messages

githubSync.title: Push to GitHub
githubSync.subtitle: Sync this app to your GitHub
githubSync.signInRequired: Sign in with a real account to connect GitHub.
githubSync.sessionExpired: Session expired — refresh and sign in again.
githubSync.notConnected: Not connected to your GitHub account
githubSync.repoInvalid: Repo link invalid — unlink and create a new one.

intro.title: Welcome to RotiCan.ai
intro.description: Describe an idea. Get a working app. No setup, no deploy, just code that runs.

modeToggle.title: Pick Your Mode
modeToggle.description: Build ships working apps. Chat is for brainstorming without the commitment.

buildPrompt.title: Describe It
buildPrompt.description: Type your idea. Hit submit. Get a working app.

buildHelpers.title: Stuck?
buildHelpers.description: Idea Wizard finds the perfect app for you. Just pick a vibe.

buildSuggestions.title: Popular Shortcuts
buildSuggestions.description: One click. Instant app. No typing required.

chatPrompt.title: Brainstorm Mode
chatPrompt.description: Ask anything. Test ideas. No apps created — just pure exploration.

chatSuggestions.title: Quick Starters
chatSuggestions.description: Jump in with these. Or ask whatever comes to mind.

completion.title: Go Build.
completion.description: Toggle between modes anytime. Build ships. Chat thinks. Your move.
